# Weru TV & Radio — llms.txt
# https://werudigital.co.ke

## About

Weru TV is Kenya's leading Kikuyu-language television and radio broadcaster, based in Nyeri, Central Kenya.
Founded over 10 years ago, Weru reaches audiences in Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Malawi and Zimbabwe.

## Platforms

- DStv Channel 368
- Azam TV Channel 342
- Startimes Channel 440
- Zuku Channel 39
- Pang & Signet (Free-to-air digital terrestrial)
- YouTube: @WERU TV & FM (https://www.youtube.com/@werutvfm3411)
- Live stream: https://werudigital.co.ke/tv

## Radio

Weru FM 96.4 — Live radio streaming at https://werudigital.co.ke/radio

## Contact

- Reception: +254 700 117026 / +254 738 970438
- Commercials: +254 707 065000
- News Hotline: +254 703 223363
- Email: weruofficial@gmail.com / news@werutv.co.ke
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/254707065000
